General.Name: China Chunlai Education Group Co. Ltd
General.Description: China Chunlai Education Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides private higher education services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates universities/colleges. It also participates in the operation of an independent college. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shangqiu, the People's Republic of China. China Chunlai Education Group Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Chunlai Investment Co., Ltd.
General.Address: No. 66, Beihai East Road, Shangqiu, China
